{{Infobox group
| name = Inquisitors
| introduced = ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness
}}

''See also: [[Inquisitors Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Inquisitors, also known as the Inquisitors of Ach’magut or [[Ach'magut]]'s Inquisitors, are the spider-like spawn of the [[Great Elder]] known as Ach’magut, the [[Overseer]]. These ten-legged creatures possess purplish skin that can shift shades to blend into shadows, and they are characterized by numerous eyes mounted on flexible stalks. They move with a skittering motion, often making clicking sounds similar to knitting needles. While they are capable of extreme violence—including decapitating foes or using fire to trap humans in rooms—they are frequently observed acting as observers, watching from the shadows or maintaining a distance to monitor events. Their primary role is to serve their master's endless hunger for knowledge by gathering and collecting information from across the [[Empire]]. They have been seen dissecting corpses to study biology, dismantling architecture to manipulate human movement, and even constructing strange machines from scavenged parts. They operate with high levels of coordination and precision under the direction of Ach’magut, though they typically only act in unison when he provides orders. When they occupy a location, such as a city or palace, they can effectively depopulate it or overwhelm the inhabitants through sheer numbers. They are known to be highly sensitive to specific objects, such as the [[Awakened nail]], and have been sighted in various locations including [[Dylia]], [[Vandenyas]], the Nire, and the [[Capital]].}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The Inquisitors are spider-like beings associated with Ach’magut. Characterized by multiple eyes that cover every angle, these entities typically function as observers. During an encounter in a southern [[Izyrian]] hive, they were cornered and revealed their practice of taking groups of prisoners on a daily basis.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Inquisitors]] were cornered in a hive in southern [[Izyria]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c11">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Inquisitors]] typically act as observers.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Inquisitors]] are spider-like beings.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c13">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Inquisitors]] take groups of prisoners each day.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Inquisitors]] are associated with Ach’magut.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Inquisitors]] have multiple eyes covering every angle.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c13" />}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Ach'magut]]'s spawn are called [[Inquisitors]] and they look like [[spiders]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c5">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Inquisitors]] are described as having spider-like legs and watching from the walls and ceiling through waving stalks.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c16">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire groups]]
